name: Flavored Butters
recipeInstructions:
1. For each flavor of butter, whip the softened butter with an electric mixer in a small bowl until smooth and fluffy.
2. Gradually add the remaining ingredients for each flavor to the whipped butter.
3. Store the flavored butters in an airtight container in the refrigerator. Yield: four flavored butters, about 3/4 to 1 cup each.
